# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 1
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK: "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

extract_mr_info:
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        echo "Extracting MR information..."
        
        # Get MR details using GitLab API
        MR_INFO=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}")
        
        # Extract title and description
        MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.title // "No title"')
        MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.description // "No description"')
        MR_AUTHOR=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.author.name // "Unknown"')
        MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.source_branch // ""')
        MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.target_branch // ""')
        MR_LABELS=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.labels | join(", ") // "none"')
        
        # Create sanitized version for tags (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)
        MR_TITLE_SAFE=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9-]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | cut -c1-50)
        
        echo "MR_TITLE=$MR_TITLE" >> build.env
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION=$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> build.env
        echo "MR_AUTHOR=$MR_AUTHOR" >> build.env
        echo "MR_SOURCE_BRANCH=$MR_SOURCE_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_TARGET_BRANCH=$MR_TARGET_BRANCH" >> build.env
        echo "MR_LABELS=$MR_LABELS" >> build.env
        echo "MR_TITLE_SAFE=$MR_TITLE_SAFE" >> build.env
        echo "MR_URL=${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" >> build.env
        
        # Create release notes fragment
        cat > release_notes.md <<EOF
      ## $MR_TITLE
      
      **Author:** $MR_AUTHOR
      **MR:** !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
      **Labels:** $MR_LABELS
      **Branch:** $MR_SOURCE_BRANCH → $MR_TARGET_BRANCH
      
      ### Description
      $MR_DESCRIPTION
      
      ### Commits
      EOF
        
        # Get commit messages for this MR
        curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}/commits" | \
          jq -r '.[] | "- " + .title + " (" + .short_id + ")"' >> release_notes.md
        
      else
        echo "Not a merge request pipeline, using commit info..."
        MR_TITLE="Direct commit: ${CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="${CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
        MR_AUTHOR="${CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR}"
        MR_TITLE_SAFE=$(echo "$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" | cut -c1-50)
        
        echo "MR_TITLE=$MR_TITLE" >> build.env
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION=$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> build.env
        echo "MR_AUTHOR=$MR_AUTHOR" >> build.env
        echo "MR_TITLE_SAFE=$MR_TITLE_SAFE" >> build.env
        echo "MR_URL=${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/commit/${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" >> build.env
        
        cat > release_notes.md <<EOF
      ## $MR_TITLE
      
      **Author:** $MR_AUTHOR
      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      **Branch:** ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
      
      ### Message
      $MR_DESCRIPTION
      EOF
      fi
      
      echo "MR Info extracted successfully"
      cat build.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    paths:
      - release_notes.md
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - main
    - master
    - develop

build_application:
  stage: build
  image: docker:20.10.16
  services:
    - docker:20.10.16-dind
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - |
      echo "Building with MR context..."
      echo "Title: $MR_TITLE"
      
      # Build version tag with MR title
      VERSION_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        FULL_TAG="${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:mr-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-${MR_TITLE_SAFE}-${VERSION_TAG}"
      else
        FULL_TAG="${CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE}:${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${VERSION_TAG}"
      fi
      
      echo "Building image: $FULL_TAG"
      
      # Build with labels including MR info
      docker build \
        --build-arg BUILD_DATE=$(date -u +'%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ') \
        --build-arg VCS_REF=${CI_COMMIT_SHA} \
        --build-arg VERSION=${VERSION_TAG} \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.title=$MR_TITLE" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.description=$MR_DESCRIPTION" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.authors=$MR_AUTHOR" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.url=$MR_URL" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.source=${CI_PROJECT_URL}" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.version=${VERSION_TAG}" \
        --label "org.opencontainers.image.revision=${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" \
        --label "mr.iid=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" \
        --label "mr.title=${MR_TITLE}" \
        --tag $FULL_TAG \
        .
      
      docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
      docker push $FULL_TAG
      
      echo "IMAGE_TAG=$FULL_TAG" >> build.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: build.env
    expire_in: 1 week

test_application:
  stage: test
  image: ${IMAGE_TAG}
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  script:
    - |
      echo "Testing build from: $MR_TITLE"
      echo "Running tests..."
      # Add your test commands here
      # npm test || pytest || mvn test
      echo "Tests completed"

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  script:
    - |
      echo "Deploying to staging environment"
      echo "Feature: $MR_TITLE"
      
      # Create deployment tag with MR title
      DEPLOY_TAG="staging-${MR_TITLE_SAFE}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
      
      # Tag the deployment in git
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      
      # Create annotated tag with MR info
      git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Staging Deployment: $MR_TITLE" \
        -m "Author: $MR_AUTHOR" \
        -m "MR: !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" \
        -m "Image: ${IMAGE_TAG}" \
        -m "" \
        -m "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
      
      # Push tag to repository
      git push "https://oauth2:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "$DEPLOY_TAG"
      
      # Deploy application (example with kubectl)
      # kubectl set image deployment/myapp myapp=${IMAGE_TAG} -n staging
      # kubectl annotate deployment/myapp \
      #   "deployment.mr/title=$MR_TITLE" \
      #   "deployment.mr/author=$MR_AUTHOR" \
      #   "deployment.mr/iid=${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" \
      #   -n staging --overwrite
      
      echo "DEPLOY_TAG=$DEPLOY_TAG" >> deploy.env
      echo "DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT=staging" >> deploy.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
    expire_in: 1 week
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - merge_requests
    - develop

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  script:
    - |
      echo "Deploying to production environment"
      echo "Feature: $MR_TITLE"
      
      # Create deployment tag with MR title
      DEPLOY_TAG="prod-${MR_TITLE_SAFE}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
      
      git config user.email "ci@gitlab.com"
      git config user.name "GitLab CI"
      
      git tag -a "$DEPLOY_TAG" -m "Production Deployment: $MR_TITLE" \
        -m "Author: $MR_AUTHOR" \
        -m "Image: ${IMAGE_TAG}" \
        -m "" \
        -m "$MR_DESCRIPTION"
      
      git push "https://oauth2:${CI_JOB_TOKEN}@${CI_SERVER_HOST}/${CI_PROJECT_PATH}.git" "$DEPLOY_TAG"
      
      echo "DEPLOY_TAG=$DEPLOY_TAG" >> deploy.env
      echo "DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT=production" >> deploy.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
    expire_in: 1 week
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://example.com
  only:
    - main
    - master
  when: manual

notify_slack_start:
  stage: build
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK" ]; then
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "{
            \"text\": \"🚀 Build Started\",
            \"blocks\": [
              {
                \"type\": \"header\",
                \"text\": {
                  \"type\": \"plain_text\",
                  \"text\": \"🚀 Build Started\"
                }
              },
              {
                \"type\": \"section\",
                \"fields\": [
                  {
                    \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",
                    \"text\": \"*Feature:*\n$MR_TITLE\"
                  },
                  {
                    \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",
                    \"text\": \"*Author:*\n$MR_AUTHOR\"
                  },
                  {
                    \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",
                    \"text\": \"*Branch:*\n$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME\"
                  },
                  {
                    \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",
                    \"text\": \"*Pipeline:*\n<${CI_PIPELINE_URL}|#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}>\"
                  }
                ]
              },
              {
                \"type\": \"section\",
                \"text\": {
                  \"type\": \"mrkdwn\",
                  \"text\": \"*Description:*\n${MR_DESCRIPTION:0:500}\"
                }
              },
              {
                \"type\": \"actions\",
                \"elements\": [
                  {
                    \"type\": \"button\",
                    \"text\": {
                      \"type\": \"plain_text\",
                      \"text\": \"View MR\"
                    },
                    \"url\": \"$MR_URL\"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }" $NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK
      fi
  allow_failure: true

notify_deployment:
  stage: notify
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
    - deploy_staging
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK" ]; then
        STATUS_EMOJI="✅"
        STATUS_TEXT="Deployment Successful"
        COLOR="good"
        
        if [ "$CI_JOB_STATUS" != "success" ]; then
          STATUS_EMOJI="❌"
          STATUS_TEXT="Deployment Failed"
          COLOR="danger"
        fi
        
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "{
            \"attachments\": [
              {
                \"color\": \"$COLOR\",
                \"title\": \"$STATUS_EMOJI $STATUS_TEXT to $DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT\",
                \"fields\": [
                  {
                    \"title\": \"Feature\",
                    \"value\": \"$MR_TITLE\",
                    \"short\": false
                  },
                  {
                    \"title\": \"Author\",
                    \"value\": \"$MR_AUTHOR\",
                    \"short\": true
                  },
                  {
                    \"title\": \"Environment\",
                    \"value\": \"$DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT\",
                    \"short\": true
                  },
                  {
                    \"title\": \"Deployment Tag\",
                    \"value\": \"$DEPLOY_TAG\",
                    \"short\": true
                  },
                  {
                    \"title\": \"Image\",
                    \"value\": \"$IMAGE_TAG\",
                    \"short\": true
                  },
                  {
                    \"title\": \"MR Labels\",
                    \"value\": \"$MR_LABELS\",
                    \"short\": true
                  },
                  {
                    \"title\": \"Pipeline\",
                    \"value\": \"<${CI_PIPELINE_URL}|#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}>\",
                    \"short\": true
                  }
                ],
                \"actions\": [
                  {
                    \"type\": \"button\",
                    \"text\": \"View MR\",
                    \"url\": \"$MR_URL\"
                  },
                  {
                    \"type\": \"button\",
                    \"text\": \"View Pipeline\",
                    \"url\": \"$CI_PIPELINE_URL\"
                  }
                ]
              }
            ]
          }" $NOTIFICATION_WEBHOOK
      fi
  when: always
  allow_failure: true

generate_release_notes:
  stage: notify
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  script:
    - |
      echo "Generating release notes..."
      
      # Create comprehensive release notes
      cat > final_release_notes.md <<EOF
      # Release Notes - $(date +%Y-%m-%d)
      
      ## Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}
      **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      **Branch:** ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
      **Triggered by:** ${CI_COMMIT_AUTHOR}
      
      ---
      
      EOF
      
      cat release_notes.md >> final_release_notes.md
      
      cat >> final_release_notes.md <<EOF
      
      ---
      
      ## Deployment Information
      - **Image:** ${IMAGE_TAG}
      - **Pipeline:** ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}
      - **Date:** $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')
      
      ## Links
      - [Merge Request]($MR_URL)
      - [Pipeline](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})
      - [Commit](${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/commit/${CI_COMMIT_SHA})
      EOF
      
      echo "Release notes generated"
      cat final_release_notes.md
      
      # Post to GitLab release (if on main/master)
      if [[ "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" == "main" || "$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME" == "master" ]]; then
        RELEASE_TAG="release-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
        
        curl --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          --data tag_name="$RELEASE_TAG" \
          --data ref="$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
          --data name="Release: $MR_TITLE" \
          --data description="$(cat final_release_notes.md)" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/releases"
      fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - final_release_notes.md
    expire_in: 30 days
  when: on_success

update_deployment_status:
  stage: notify
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
    - deploy_staging
  script:
    - |
      # Update MR with deployment information
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        NOTE_BODY="### Deployment Update\n\n"
        NOTE_BODY="${NOTE_BODY}✅ Successfully deployed to **$DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT**\n\n"
        NOTE_BODY="${NOTE_BODY}- **Tag:** \`$DEPLOY_TAG\`\n"
        NOTE_BODY="${NOTE_BODY}- **Image:** \`$IMAGE_TAG\`\n"
        NOTE_BODY="${NOTE_BODY}- **Pipeline:** [#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})\n"
        NOTE_BODY="${NOTE_BODY}- **Time:** $(date -u +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC')\n"
        
        curl --request POST \
          --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          --data "body=$NOTE_BODY" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}/notes"
      fi
  when: on_success
  allow_failure: true
